title: SPARQL: ORDER BY returning results in incorrect rows
poc:
PREFIX cat: <http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Category:>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
select * where {
  ?ppl rdf:type cat:Powerplant .
  ?ppl rdfs:label ?name .
} order by ?ppl
key_bug_features: ORDER BY causing incorrect rdfs:label URI mapping
bug_feature_seed: SPARQL PREFIX cat: <http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?ppl ?name WHERE { ?ppl rdf:type cat:Powerplant ; rdfs:label ?name } ORDER BY ?ppl;

SPARQL PREFIX cat: <http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?ppl ?name WHERE { ?ppl rdf:type cat:Powerplant ; rdfs:label ?name } ORDER BY ?name;

SPARQL PREFIX cat: <http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?ppl ?name WHERE { ?ppl rdf:type cat:Powerplant ; rdfs:label ?name } ORDER BY STR(?ppl);

SPARQL PREFIX cat: <http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?ppl ?name WHERE { ?ppl rdf:type cat:Powerplant ; rdfs:label ?name } ORDER BY STR(?name);

SPARQL PREFIX cat: <http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?ppl (SAMPLE(?name) AS ?sampleName) WHERE { ?ppl rdf:type cat:Powerplant ; rdfs:label ?name } GROUP BY ?ppl ORDER BY ?ppl;

SPARQL PREFIX cat: <http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?ppl ?name WHERE { ?ppl rdf:type cat:Powerplant ; rdfs:label ?name } ORDER BY ?ppl ?name;

SPARQL PREFIX cat: <http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?ppl ?name WHERE { ?ppl rdf:type cat:Powerplant ; rdfs:label ?name } ORDER BY ?ppl;

SPARQL PREFIX cat: <http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?ppl ?name WHERE { ?ppl rdf:type cat:Powerplant ; rdfs:label ?name } ORDER BY DESC(?ppl);

SPARQL PREFIX cat: <http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?ppl ?name WHERE { ?ppl rdf:type cat:Powerplant ; rdfs:label ?name } LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0;

SPARQL PREFIX cat: <http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?ppl ?name WHERE { ?ppl rdf:type cat:Powerplant ; rdfs:label ?name } ORDER BY ?ppl LIMIT 10;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Powerplants (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, uri VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, label VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, latitude FLOAT, longitude FLOAT);
INSERT INTO Powerplants (id, uri, label, latitude, longitude) VALUES (1, 'http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Ahmedabad_Ashima_Powerplant', 'Ahmedabad Ashima Powerplant', 23.0333, 72.6167);
INSERT INTO Powerplants (id, uri, label, latitude, longitude) VALUES (2, 'http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Ahmedabad_Electro_Melt_Powerplant', 'Ahmedabad Electro Melt Powerplant', 23.0333, 72.6167);
INSERT INTO Powerplants (id, uri, label, latitude, longitude) VALUES (3, 'http://enipedia.tudelft.nl/wiki/Arvind_Intex_Powerplant', 'Arvind Intex Powerplant', 23.0333, 72.6167);
SELECT * FROM Powerplants ORDER BY uri;
